title: George Municipality launches official WhatsApp Channel for real-time service updates
description: BUSINESS NEWS - George residents can now...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - George residents can now receive real-time updates directly to their phones, thanks to the municipality’s newly launched official WhatsApp Channel. This initiative aims to keep the public informed about important service delivery updates such as water outages, electricity interruptions, roadworks and other emergency alerts.


> Joining the George Municipality WhatsApp Channel is quick and easy. Residents can click on this link or scan the QR code provided in the municipality’s online and printed notices to subscribe.


Once joined, users will receive direct updates without the clutter of group messages or unrelated content.

The municipality promises that essential news, alerts, and notices will be shared straight from the source, thus ensuring accuracy and timeliness.

The platform is designed to be a fast and efficient way for locals to stay informed and prepared, especially during service disruptions or emergencies.“We encourage all residents to join the channel. It’s the most convenient way to receive the latest service delivery updates,” said the George Municipality.

Benefits of subscribing include:

- Clutter-free, direct notifications
- Timely service delivery information
- Essential municipal alerts and notices
- Official information from the source - no need to rely on hearsay

Residents are urged not to miss important updates that could affect their daily lives. With the WhatsApp Channel, the George Municipality is making it easier than ever to stay informed, stay prepared, and stay connected.

For more information or to join, visit: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaRHVS9HAdNXTJPKis3kStay informed. Stay prepared. Stay connected.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
